memory.title: Memory
memory.subtitle: Personal knowledge that Alia remembers across conversations. Share information naturally and it's saved automatically.
memory.shareInfo: Share personal information with Alia and it will be saved here automatically
memory.addForAlia: Add a new memory for Alia to remember
memory.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this memory? This action cannot be undone.
memory.aiSearchEnabled: AI search enabled — finds semantically related memories
memory.semanticUnavailable: Semantic search unavailable, using text search
memory.exportDescription: Download your memories, preferences, and context
memory.importDescription: Upload a JSON export file to restore or merge memories
memory.skipDescription: Only add new memories, skip existing
memory.noDuplicates: No duplicates found — your memory is clean!

telegram.title: Telegram Gateway
telegram.subtitle: Link your Telegram accounts for Alia to respond as you
telegram.disconnectDescription: This will disconnect {{name}} from Alia. You'll need to scan the QR code again to reconnect.
telegram.linkDescription: Connect your Telegram account to let Alia respond to messages on your behalf. You'll scan a QR code with your phone, just like Telegram Desktop.
telegram.scanInstructions: Open Telegram on your phone, go to Settings > Devices > Link Desktop Device, then scan this code.

signal.title: Signal Gateway
signal.subtitle: Link your Signal accounts for Alia to respond as you
signal.disconnectDescription: This will unlink {{name}} from Alia. You'll need to scan the QR code again to reconnect.
signal.linkDescription: Connect your Signal account to let Alia respond to messages on your behalf. You'll scan a QR code with your phone, just like Signal Desktop.
signal.scanInstructions: Open Signal on your phone, go to Settings > Linked Devices > Link New Device, then scan this code.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp Gateway
whatsapp.subtitle: Link your WhatsApp accounts for Alia to respond as you
whatsapp.disconnectDescription: This will disconnect {{name}} from Alia. You'll need to scan the QR code again to reconnect.
whatsapp.linkDescription: Connect your WhatsApp account to let Alia respond to messages on your behalf. You'll scan a QR code with your phone, just like WhatsApp Web.
whatsapp.step3: 3. Open WhatsApp > Linked Devices > Link a Device
whatsapp.step4: 4. Scan the QR code with your phone
whatsapp.scanInstructions: Open WhatsApp on your phone, go to Settings > Linked Devices > Link a Device, then scan this code.
